name: Deity S-Mic 2s Microphone
description: Offering a shorter, lighter body than the S-Mic 2, the Deity Microphones S-Mic 2S moisture-resistant short shotgun microphone helps boom operators achieve broadcast-quality sound in reality TV.

features.Key Features:: For Indie Films & Multi-Subject Scenes | Moisture-Resistant for Humid Conditions | Short Body, Phantom Powered | Simple Operation with No Controls | Built to Inhibit RF Interference | Low-Noise Circuitry | High Sensitivity Requires Less Gain | Smooth Tone with Low Off-Axis Coloration | Ultralightweight Solid Brass Housing | Includes Waterproof Hardshell Case
features.What's in The Box?: Deity Microphones S-Mic 2S Moisture-Resistant Short Shotgun Microphone | Mic Clip with Threaded 3/8" Female Mount | Foam Windscreen | Waterproof Hardshell Case
